zh.lifeSummary: 當Anne Sianley於1422年出生在英國英格蘭素可可拉勒 普拉斯時，她的父親John Knightley29歲，母親Margaret Lewknor27歲。她於1437年與William Cheyney在英國英格蘭易亞斯特 素可瓦布萊頓結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世在英國英格蘭易亞斯特 素可瓦布萊頓，埋葬在英國英格蘭易亞斯特 素可瓦布萊頓。

nameMeanings.name: Sianley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Stanley, including those in Yorkshire, Staffordshire, Derbyshire, Durham, Gloucestershire, and Wiltshire, named with Old English stān ‘stone, rock’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. This English name has been established in Ireland since the 13th century where it was Gaelicized as de Stainléigh.

English: possibly also a variant of Stoneley, a habitational name from Stoneley Green in Burland (Cheshire), Stoneleigh (Warwickshire), or Stonely in Kimbolton (Huntingdonshire), all named with Old English stān ‘stone, rock’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.
Americanized form of any of various like-sounding names in other languages, for example Polish Stanislawski , Greek Anastasiou , and Serbian Stojadinov (patronymic from the personal name Stojadin).

variants.name: Stanislawski
meanings: Polish (Stanisławski): habitational name for someone from any of various places called Stanisław, Stanisławów, or Stanisławice, named with the personal name Stanisław (see Stanislav ).

nameMeanings.name: Anne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

variants.name: Anni
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

en.lifeSummary: When Anne Sianley was born in 1422, in Cralle Place, Sussex, England, United Kingdom, her father, John Knightley, was 29 and her mother, Margaret Lewknor, was 27. She married William Cheyney in 1437, in Warbleton, East Sussex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 2 daughters. She died in Warbleton, East Sussex, England, United Kingdom, and was buried in Warbleton, East Sussex, England, United Kingdom.

Elle a épousé William Cheyney en 1437, à Warbleton, East Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée à Warbleton, East Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterrée à Warbleton, East Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Anne Sianleyが1422年にイギリスイギリススセックスクラル プレイスで生まれた時，父John Knightleyは29歳，母Margaret Lewknorは27歳であった。1437年にイギリスイギリスエアスト スセックスワーブレトンでWilliam Cheyneyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女はイギリスイギリスエアスト スセックスワーブレトンで死去し，イギリスイギリスエアスト スセックスワーブレトンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Anne Sianley(이)가 1422년 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 크라 플레이스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Knightley(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Lewknor(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1437년 영국 잉글랜드 이스트 수세스 워블레턴에서 William Cheyney(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 영국 잉글랜드 이스트 수세스 워블레턴에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 이스트 수세스 워블레턴에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anne Sianley родилась в 1422 г. в местности кралл плеис, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John Knightley было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Lewknor, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Cheyney в 1437 г. в местности варблетон, эаст суссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла в местности варблетон, эаст суссекс, Англия, Великобритания и была похоронена в местности варблетон, эаст суссекс, Англия, Великобритания.
